# Processed data

Output from the offline data pipeline. Files here are ready for the backend and graph engines.

## Planned contents

| Output | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Cleaned CSVs / Parquet | Normalised centre, service, and licence tables |
| Knowledge graph | Nodes and edges (centres, services, locations, relationships) |
| Lookup indexes | Fast search/filter structures for the API |

## Generated by

`src/scripts/` — run after updating files in `data/raw/`.

## Rules

- Do not edit manually; regenerate via scripts.
- Safe to delete and rebuild from raw data at any time.
